title: lycopodium complanatum var. habereri
intro: Lycopodium complanatum var. habereri is a variety of the club moss plant, a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum var. habereri include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and improve digestion. Lycopodium complanatum var. habereri can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
